content:
🚀 CasaOS | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a user-friendly, self-hosted personal cloud experience for managing applications and services.
✨ Key Features: • Simple and elegant UI • Easy app installation and management • Supports Docker applications • Extensible plugin system • Focus on user autonomy and cost reduction
📖 Summary: CasaOS is an open-source personal cloud operating system designed for ease of use and elegance. It allows users to easily manage applications and services on their own hardware, providing a self-hosted alternative to cloud services.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
